title: Desert Wastelands
description: A new deserted island themed modpack with horror entities waiting for you.
body:
This new exciting modpack adds all of the scary creatures from Frostbitten Nightmares, but with a desert-ish themed world. We've included optimizations to help people on lower-end devices run it too. It includes: The Man from The Fog, From The Fog, Better Cave Dweller, Doctor Who: Weeping Angels, Friday the 13th: Jason Voorhees, Midnight Lurker, and so much more! Play now, try and beat the creatures. We bet you can't easily beat it, it comes with temperature mods so be careful you aren't too hot/cold.
